creator: freebsd@onyphe.io
text:
We found the workaround: downloading  phantomjs-2.1.1-macosx.zip from http://phantomjs.org/download.html, then move it to /usr/local/www/kibana6/node_modules/x-pack/plugins/reporting/.phantom/

But that's just a workaround, the file should ship with the kibana6 port.

Best regards,
